issues.problem: Tagged [UNVERIFIED] (Tier 4 — inferred) but SP INSERT explicitly passes GETDATE() as column 11. Writer describes the source correctly in the description text but contradicts with the tier tag. Should be (Tier 2 — SP_CEPDailyAudit).

No Phase Gate Checklist present. Cannot verify whether P2 (live sample queries) or P3 (distribution/NULL analysis) were executed. Data claims (row count ~1,003, date range, TypeOfChange enum values) are unverifiable.
Missing ### 5.2 ETL Pipeline subsection header — diagram content is correct but structure deviates from golden reference shape.
Footer has tier counts and quality score but no phases-completed checklist (e.g., P1/P2/P3 markers).
Mentions IsActive in business logic context without clarifying it is a source column used for change detection, not a column in this table. Could mislead analysts.

verdict.regeneration_feedback: Re-run with: (1) Re-tag UpdateDate as (Tier 2 — SP_CEPDailyAudit), removing [UNVERIFIED] — SP INSERT clearly shows GETDATE(). (2) Add Phase Gate Checklist section with P1/P2/P3 checkboxes. (3) Add ### 5.2 ETL Pipeline subsection label. (4) Add phases-completed markers to footer. (5) Clarify in Section 2 that IsActive is a source column for change detection, not present in this table.
